apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Refactor the construction of the dynamic claims map to use intermediate variables and Map.of for the top-level structure.
apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.human_impl: var acmeData = new HashMap<String, Object>(); acmeData.put("roles", List.of(clientId + "_user")); return Map.of("acme", acmeData);

apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add a new static claim 'foo' with value 'bar' to the dynamic claims payload.

apps/backend-api-springboot3/src/main/ja.general_idea: Update the backend version string in the API response to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add necessary imports for new Spring Security OAuth2 client components and Actuator properties.
Inject CorsEndpointProperties into the SecurityFilterChain bean method signature.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, ClientRegistrationRepository clientRegistrationRepository, CorsEndpointProperties corsEndpointProperties)

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Permit all access to the /auth/register endpoint to support dynamic user self-registration.
Refactor OAuth2 authorization code grant configuration to use the lambda-based customizer API.
Refactor OAuth2 login user info endpoint configuration to use the lambda-based customizer API.
Add a helper method to customize token endpoint request parameters for backchannel logout support.
Define an explicit AuthorizationRequestRepository bean using HttpSession for OAuth2 authorization requests.
Define an explicit OAuth2AuthorizedClientRepository bean using HttpSession for storing authorized clients.
Define an explicit OAuth2AuthorizedClientService bean using HttpSession for managing authorized clients.
Inject ClientRegistrationRepository to enable programmatic OAuth2 authorization request resolution.
Inject AuthorizationRequestRepository to manage the state of OAuth2 authorization requests.
Implement a new endpoint to initiate anonymous user registration via Keycloak's registration flow with PKCE.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.human_impl: @GetMapping("/auth/register") public ResponseEntity<?> register(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) { ... }

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Replace deprecated SecurityContextHolder.clearContext() with HttpServletRequest.logout() for session invalidation.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Refactor JWT generation to use explicit payload maps and separate methods for different signing algorithms.
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Replaced single generateClientJwtToken method with generateTokenSignedWithPrivateKey and generateTokenSignedWithClientSecret.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Correct the JWT audience claim to include the token endpoint path as per OIDC spec.
Add JOSE header parameters like type and x5t thumbprint to the JWT.
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Used JWSHeader.Builder to set JOSEObjectType.JWT and x509CertThumbprint.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Add support for OAuth 2.0 Pushed Authorization Requests (PAR).
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Added requestPAR method to POST to /protocol/openid-connect/ext/par/request.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Reduce the JWT token lifetime for security in the example.
Add utility methods to parse X.509 certificates and create key thumbprints.
apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.human_impl: Added parseCertificate and createKeyThumbprint methods using X509CertUtils.

apps/jwt-client-authentication/src/main/.general_idea: Add support for signing JWTs with HMAC-SHA256 using a client secret.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x equivalents to align with modern Spring Boot dependencies.
Refactor SSL socket factory creation to use the builder pattern required by HttpClient 5.x.
Refactor HTTP client connection manager creation to use the builder pattern required by HttpClient 5.x.
Adjust line breaks in method chaining for better readability.

apps/spring-boot-device-flow-client/src/.general_idea: Remove client_secret from the device authorization request to align with public client flow.
Remove offline_access scope from the device flow request.

bin/applyRealmConfig.java.general_idea: Include an additional docker-compose configuration file for Keycloak X in the restart command.

bin/createTlsCerts.java.general_idea: Introduce constants and logic to support specifying a custom PKCS12 output filename via environment variable or command-line argument.
bin/createTlsCerts.java.human_impl: static final String P12_FILE_OPT= "--p12-file"; ... var p12File = Optional.ofNullable(System.getenv(P12_FILE_ENV))...

bin/createTlsCerts.java.general_idea: Add support for a '--client' flag that passes the p12-file and client arguments to the mkcert command.
Wrap the mkcert process execution in a try-catch block to detect if the tool is missing and provide a helpful error message.
bin/createTlsCerts.java.human_impl: try { var processMkcert = pb.start(); ... } catch (Exception e) { System.out.println("Please install mkcert."); ... }

bin/envcheck.java.general_idea: Update docker compose version check command to use the standard 'version' subcommand instead of the deprecated '-v' flag.
Add a runtime check to verify that the 'mkcert' tool is installed and accessible in the environment.

keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.general_idea: Update calls to AccountEmail.send to include the KeycloakSession as the first argument, adapting to a changed method signature in the Keycloak API.
Add a new static method to handle account update events and send corresponding notification emails.

keycloak/extensions/src/main/java/com/gi.general_idea: Inline the realmDisplayName variable usage directly into the email sending calls to reduce local variable declarations.
Move the jakarta.ws.rs.core.UriInfo import to the top of the import block to maintain alphabetical ordering.
